rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When adding a new module in src/utils/, follow the established co-located test pattern: src/utils/<name>.test.ts next to src/utils/<name>.ts, matching existing files like retry.test.ts and result.test","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Kody's clarifying questions about config fields and rules went unanswered, blocking the implementation — product answers must precede code generation.","scope":"configValidator"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Use TDD: write the test file first (red), then implement the module (green), per project acceptance criteria for new utilities.","scope":"src/utils"}]}
